title: Zesty Chickpea Salad
description: A refreshing, high-fiber, and high-protein salad requiring no cooking at all.
ingredients: 1.5 cups Boiled Chickpeas (Kala Chana or Kabuli)
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the boiled chickpeas, diced cucumber, tomato, and onion.
Add lemon juice, chaat masala, salt, and pepper.
Toss everything together until well mixed.
Serve chilled or at room temperature as a snack or light meal.
